title: What Tech Stack Should You Use?
description: Answer 6 questions and find out the perfect tech stack for your next project
viralHook: I got 'Boring Stack' (Rails + Postgres) and honestly... they're right

questions.question: What are you building?
questions.explanation: SaaS = Next.js + Postgres + Stripe. The golden combo.

questions.question: How much do you care about performance?
options: It needs to be blazing fast
questions.explanation: Fast enough wins. Premature optimization is the root of all evil.

questions.question: Your deployment preference?
options: AWS — I love YAML configs at 2am
questions.explanation: Push to main, get a URL. Modern deployment should be boring.

questions.question: How do you feel about TypeScript?
options: JavaScript is fine, stop type-shaming me
Give me a compiled language or give me death
I'm still writing PHP and loving it
questions.explanation: TypeScript catches bugs before your users do. Worth the initial setup.

questions.question: Database choice?
options: I'll figure it out later (famous last words)
questions.explanation: Postgres handles 99% of use cases. Start there.

questions.question: What's your timeline?
options: It's done when it's done (so... never)
questions.explanation: Constraints breed creativity. Weekend projects ship. Infinite timelines don't.
